description: Applies the Westergaard approximation for the dynamic response of water to the surface faces in the range. This operates by changing the inertial mass of the gridpoints connected to the surface faces in the range. This command is only available if model configure dynamic has been specified.

keywords.name: base
keywords.description: elevation of the base of the reservoir

keywords.name: density-water
keywords.description: density of the water in the reservoir

keywords.name: direction
keywords.description: reversal direction of the hydrodynamic wave propagation. This direction must be in the horizontal plane.

keywords.name: factor
keywords.description: optional coefficient, the default value is 0.743

keywords.name: height
keywords.description: height of the water in the reservoir
